quality_notes.cah_style: SHORT & PUNCHY - Each clue is absurd juxtaposition of zodiac/birthstone culture with modern reality
quality_notes.mainstream_references: Instagram, TikTok, therapy discourse, zodiac obsession memes, Mercury Retrograde, personality types
quality_notes.humor_pattern: Setup uses zodiac/birthstone fact → Punchline reveals relatable modern behavior
quality_notes.examples: What the zodiac sign justifies → Cultural observation of that sign's stereotype
